Occult blood positive seen by GI no scopes, hemoglobin stabilized. Diagnosed with multifocal anemia pneumonia started on antibiotics. Thought to be aspiration. Dysphagia, did not clear speech therapy but refused tube feeding or G-tube placement. Placed on puréed diet. Encephalopathy improved Acute on chronic CHF exacerbation also stabilized on diuretics. Admitted to us for rehab Past medical history hypertension CHF hypothyroidism depression and chronic A-fib Physical examination Vital stable CVS S1-S2 irregular Lungs clear Extremities edema lower extremities stable Generalized weakness, improving Assessment: Multifocal pneumonia Dysphagia Chronic A-fib Acute on chronic CHF exacerbation Encephalopathy Generalized weakness Melena Hypertension Hypothyroidism Depression Plan: Diuretics for CHF Nebs and O2 Blood pressure is controlled Apixaban for anticoagulation for chronic A-fib Synthroid replacement Pureed diet speech therapy Pain
